prayerGuide.title: How to Perform Eid Prayer?
prayerGuide.subtitle: Step by step Eid prayer guide — takbeers and prayers
prayerGuide.whatIsDesc: Eid prayer is a 2-rakat prayer performed on the morning of Eid al-Fitr and Eid al-Adha. According to the Hanafi school, it is wajib (obligatory), while other schools consider it sunnah muakkadah. Eid prayer is performed in congregation at mosques, followed by a khutbah.
prayerGuide.howMany: How Many Rakats is Eid Prayer?
prayerGuide.howManyDesc: Eid prayer is 2 rakats. Unlike regular prayers, additional takbeers (zawaid takbeers) are recited in each rakat. 3 extra takbeers in the first rakat and 3 in the second, totaling 6 additional takbeers.
prayerGuide.stepByStep: How to Perform Eid Prayer (Step by Step)
prayerGuide.step1Desc: Make the intention: "I intend to pray the Eid prayer for the sake of Allah." Raise your hands and say "Allahu Akbar" for the opening takbeer to begin the prayer.
prayerGuide.step2Desc: After the opening takbeer, recite the Subhanaka prayer.
prayerGuide.step3Desc: After Subhanaka, the imam says "Allahu Akbar" 3 times. With each takbeer, raise your hands to your ears and let them drop to your sides. After the third takbeer, fold your hands.
prayerGuide.step4Desc: The imam recites Surah al-Fatiha followed by another surah. Then bow for ruku and prostrate for sujud as in regular prayer. The first rakat is complete.
prayerGuide.step5Desc: Stand up for the second rakat. The imam first recites Fatiha and a surah.
prayerGuide.step6Desc: After the surah, the imam says "Allahu Akbar" 3 times. With each takbeer, raise and lower your hands. After the third takbeer, go directly into ruku (do not fold hands).
prayerGuide.step7Desc: After ruku and sujud, sit and recite Ettehiyyatu, Allahumma Salli, Allahumma Barik and Rabbana prayers. Give salam to complete the prayer.
prayerGuide.step8Desc: In Eid prayer, the khutbah is delivered after the prayer (unlike Friday prayer). Listening to the khutbah is sunnah.
prayerGuide.tekbirText: Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar. La ilaha illallahu wallahu Akbar. Allahu Akbar wa lillahi'l-hamd.
prayerGuide.afterPrayerText: O Allah! On this blessed day of Eid, accept our prayers. Grant the Ummah of Muhammad unity, togetherness and peace. Make our Eid blessed. Amin.
prayerGuide.faq1Q: How many rakats is Eid prayer?
prayerGuide.faq1A: Eid prayer is 2 rakats. Extra takbeers are recited in both rakats. 3 extra takbeers in the first rakat and 3 in the second.
prayerGuide.faq2A: According to the Hanafi school, Eid prayer is wajib (obligatory). According to the Shafi'i school, it is sunnah muakkadah. Both views agree that performing it carries great reward.
prayerGuide.faq3A: Eid prayer is performed approximately 45-50 minutes after sunrise. The exact time varies by city. You can find your city's Eid prayer time on our website.
prayerGuide.faq4Q: How many people are needed for Eid prayer?
prayerGuide.faq4A: According to the Hanafi school, Eid prayer is performed in congregation and requires at least 4 people (including the imam). It cannot be prayed alone. Other schools allow individual prayer.
prayerGuide.faq5A: Yes, women can pray Eid prayer. They can participate in Eid prayer in the sections designated for women in mosques.
prayerGuide.faq6Q: Is it sinful to miss Eid prayer?
prayerGuide.faq6A: According to the Hanafi school, since Eid prayer is wajib, missing it without a valid excuse is sinful. However, it cannot be made up (qada).

defaultMessages: May this blessed Eid bring peace, happiness and prosperity to you and your family.
Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful and blessed Eid al-Fitr.
May the blessings of Ramadan continue to shine upon you this Eid.
Eid Mubarak! May your celebrations be filled with joy and togetherness.
On this beautiful day of Eid, may your heart be filled with happiness and gratitude.
May Allah accept your fasting, prayers and good deeds. Eid Mubarak!
Wishing you a wonderful Eid celebration surrounded by your loved ones.
May this Eid bring peace to your heart and blessings to your home.

genel: Eid Mubarak! Wishing you and your loved ones a blessed and joyful celebration.
May this blessed Eid bring peace, happiness and prosperity to you and your family. Happy Eid!
May the joy, happiness and blessings of Eid be with you always. Many happy returns.
Wishing you a blessed Eid al-Fitr filled with peace, love and happiness!
On this beautiful day, I extend my warmest Eid greetings to you from the bottom of my heart.
May your Eid table be blessed, your smiles abundant, and your loved ones near. Happy Eid!
On this blessed Eid, may hearts unite, tables be filled, and prayers be accepted. Eid Mubarak!
May this Eid al-Fitr bring goodness to the entire Muslim Ummah. Eid Mubarak.
aile: My dear family, we are blessed to be together this Eid. I love you all so much. Happy Eid!
Dear Mom / Dad, I kiss your hands and wish you a blessed Eid. May you have many healthy and peaceful Eids.
Dear family, even though I'm far away, my heart is with you. Wishing you all the best this Eid.
Sending love to our grandparents. Your prayers are with us, your love is in our hearts. Eid Mubarak!
Dear sibling, I cherish growing up with you and sharing the same table. Happy Eid!
May the joy, unity and love of our family last forever. This Eid, may our hearts be united and our table blessed.
resmi: Dear colleagues, I extend my warmest Eid greetings and wish you health and happiness.
May Eid bring peace and prosperity to our professional lives as well. Happy Eid.
It is a great pleasure working with you. Wishing you and your family a blessed Eid.
Dear teacher, wishing you a healthy and peaceful Eid. Eid Mubarak.
We wish our valued clients and business partners a blessed Eid al-Fitr.
komik: I'm waiting for my Eid gift money, just so you know! 😄 Jokes aside, Eid Mubarak!
If you gained weight during Eid, don't worry — everyone did. The important thing is leaving the table happy! Happy Eid 🍬
I'm lining up to kiss hands — not counting the gift money, but not not counting it either. Happy Eid! 💰
What do you love more during Eid visits — tea or baklava? I love both. Eid Mubarak! 🍵
Ramadan is over but I'm still checking the iftar time out of habit. Have a wonderful Eid! 😅
I wanted to be the first to send this Eid message. If I'm late, at least my intentions were good! Happy Eid! 🏃
dua: May Allah fill your heart with peace, your home with blessings, and your life with health this Eid. Amin. Eid Mubarak.
May Allah accept your prayers, forgive your sins, and unite you with your loved ones this blessed Eid.
May every prayer made this Eid be answered, and every fast be accepted. May Allah bless your Eid.
O Allah, grant the Ummah unity, togetherness and peace this Eid. Eid Mubarak.
O Allah, do not separate us from our loved ones, do not leave our tables empty, and do not turn away our prayers. Eid Mubarak.
